title: Ministry of Humour Mug & Hip Flask Set - Explicit Content
description: Give the joker in your life the perfect gift with this mug and hip flask boxed gift set. From the Ministry of Humour by HARVEY MAKIN - putting the tongue into giftware's cheek. The set features bold mock content warning - 'Home and office advisory - may verbalise explicit content'. A great gift for a foul mouthed man with love of a little something extra in their cuppa. Complete with gift box. The Ministry of Humour has one objective- to help bring a smile to the grumpy old git's face. Tongue in cheek slogans and bold but blokey colours on a collection of mugs, socks, stationery and glassware provide the perfect collection of novelty giftware for the man who doesn't take himself too seriously. The HARVEY MAKIN brand offers a broad collection of high quality gentlemen�s giftware that is classic, modern and stylish. The brand fuses well chosen materials with trend led designs and licenses to offer an unrivalled assortment of gifts for the discerning father or friend.
